{
  "title": "jakal-flow Local Runtime Bootstrap",
  "summary": "First freeze one shared environment contract so every launcher resolves the same managed checkout, virtualenv, and desktop path. Then normalize the upstream Jakal-flow source into a stable local checkout, fan out into parallel backend and desktop setup tracks with disjoint wrapper ownership, and finally reconverge for one verification and operator-docs checkpoint so the environment is repeatable and handoff-ready.",
